Title: [Bulk Assignment] Verify running query again via advanced search displays latest assignment changes
Preconditions: User has bulk assignment privileges. Multiple persons exist in search results.
ShortDescription: AC: PBI 915981 - After bulk operation with no refresh - running query again displays updated data.
Description: AC: PBI 915981 - Verify that after bulk operation completes without refresh - user can run query again via advanced search to see the latest assignment changes reflected in grid.

Step Action: Login to the application with valid credentials
Step Expected: User successfully logs in and lands on the home page

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: Bulk Assignment list view is displayed

Step Action: Open Advanced Search panel
Step Expected: Advanced Search form is displayed

Step Action: Enter search criteria and click Search button
Step Expected: Search results are displayed in the grid with person records

Step Action: Note the current assignment status of displayed records
Step Expected: Current location and staff assignment columns show existing values

Step Action: Select multiple person records by clicking checkboxes
Step Expected: Selected records are highlighted and selection count is updated

Step Action: Click Assign Location button and complete the assignment
Step Expected: Location assignment completes successfully

Step Action: Verify the grid list is NOT refreshed and selections retained
Step Expected: Grid shows same data as before with selections intact

Step Action: Note that grid still shows old assignment data since no refresh occurred
Step Expected: Assignment columns still show previous values

Step Action: Click Search button again in Advanced Search to run query
Step Expected: New query is executed against the database

Step Action: Verify grid now displays updated assignment data
Step Expected: Location assignment column now shows the newly assigned location for affected records

Step Action: Verify selections are cleared after new search
Step Expected: All selections are cleared as expected per search behavior

Step Action: Logout from the application
Step Expected: User successfully logs out

Title: [Bulk Assignment] Verify Select All Records button never displays
Preconditions: User has bulk assignment privileges. Search results exist with multiple records.
ShortDescription: AC: PBI 915981 - Select all records button never displays in Bulk Assignment grid.
Description: AC: PBI 915981 - Verify the select all records button never displays in the Bulk Assignment grid under any circumstances.

Step Action: Login to the application with valid credentials
Step Expected: User successfully logs in and lands on the home page

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: Bulk Assignment list view is displayed

Step Action: Enter search criteria and click Search button
Step Expected: Search results are displayed in the grid with person records

Step Action: Verify the grid header checkbox area
Step Expected: Select All Records button is NOT displayed

Step Action: Select a few records individually
Step Expected: Records are selected but no Select All option appears

Step Action: Scroll through the grid if pagination exists
Step Expected: Select All Records button does not appear at any point

Step Action: Perform a bulk operation and return to grid
Step Expected: Select All Records button still does not appear

Step Action: Logout from the application
Step Expected: User successfully logs out

Title: [Bulk Assignment] Verify selections retained when user cancels bulk operation dialog
Preconditions: User has bulk assignment privileges. Search results exist with selectable records.
ShortDescription: AC: PBI 915981 - Selections retained on dialog cancel. Grid not refreshed.
Description: AC: PBI 915981 - Verify selections remain intact when user cancels or closes any bulk operation dialog without completing the operation.

Step Action: Login to the application with valid credentials
Step Expected: User successfully logs in and lands on the home page

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: Bulk Assignment list view is displayed

Step Action: Enter search criteria and click Search button
Step Expected: Search results are displayed in the grid with person records

Step Action: Select multiple person records by clicking checkboxes
Step Expected: Selected records are highlighted and selection count is updated

Step Action: Note the current selection count and selected records
Step Expected: Selection state is recorded for verification

Step Action: Click Assign Location button to open dialog
Step Expected: Assign Location dialog stepper opens

Step Action: Click Cancel or Close button on the dialog without completing operation
Step Expected: Dialog closes without completing the assignment

Step Action: Verify all previous selections are still intact
Step Expected: Selection count remains same and same records are still selected

Step Action: Verify grid data has not changed
Step Expected: Grid displays same data as before dialog was opened

Step Action: Repeat steps 6-9 for Assign Staff dialog
Step Expected: Selections retained after canceling Assign Staff dialog

Step Action: Repeat steps 6-9 for Unassign Location dialog
Step Expected: Selections retained after canceling Unassign Location dialog

Step Action: Repeat steps 6-9 for Unassign Staff dialog
Step Expected: Selections retained after canceling Unassign Staff dialog

Step Action: Logout from the application
Step Expected: User successfully logs out

Title: [Bulk Assignment] Verify multiple sequential bulk operations retain selections without refresh
Preconditions: User has bulk assignment privileges. Multiple persons exist that can have both location and staff assigned.
ShortDescription: AC: PBI 915981 - Selections persist across multiple sequential bulk operations. List never refreshes.
Description: AC: PBI 915981 - Verify selections retained and list not refreshed when performing multiple bulk operations sequentially on same selection.

Step Action: Login to the application with valid credentials
Step Expected: User successfully logs in and lands on the home page

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: Bulk Assignment list view is displayed

Step Action: Enter search criteria and click Search button
Step Expected: Search results are displayed in the grid with person records

Step Action: Select multiple person records by clicking checkboxes
Step Expected: Selected records are highlighted and selection count is updated

Step Action: Note the grid data and selection count
Step Expected: Initial state is recorded

Step Action: Click Assign Location button and complete the assignment
Step Expected: Location assignment completes successfully

Step Action: Verify list is NOT refreshed and selections are retained
Step Expected: Grid shows same data and same records remain selected

Step Action: Click Assign Staff button and complete the assignment
Step Expected: Staff assignment completes successfully

Step Action: Verify list is NOT refreshed and selections are retained
Step Expected: Grid shows same data and same records remain selected

Step Action: Click Unassign Location button and complete the unassignment
Step Expected: Location unassignment completes successfully

Step Action: Verify list is NOT refreshed and selections are retained
Step Expected: Grid shows same data and same records remain selected

Step Action: Click Unassign Staff button and complete the unassignment
Step Expected: Staff unassignment completes successfully

Step Action: Verify list is NOT refreshed and selections are retained
Step Expected: Grid shows same data and same records remain selected

Step Action: Logout from the application
Step Expected: User successfully logs out
